title: State Dept. scrambles to aid stranded Americans amid attacks, airport closures
author: Adam Taylor, Dan Lamothe, Sammy Westfall
fullText: The Trump administration said it is looking to use a mix of military and chartered flights to help U.S. citizens leave the Middle East as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.
summary: The Trump administration said it is looking to use a mix of military and chartered flights to help U.S. citizens leave the Middle East as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.
